llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s final coverage plan includes several categories. For travel coverage, 'adventure_travel' (€50/month, global adventure sports) matches 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' (rating 10) under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance, and 'business_travel' (€10/month) corresponds loosely to 'Business Travel Support' (rating 6), though the cost is much lower. For additional services, 'professional_liability' (€45/month) is not directly listed but best resembles compliance-related protection, while '24_7_support' (€14/month) aligns conceptually with 'Telemedicine Services' (rating 10).
